contents:
嘿嘿，告诉你智库是怎么提供思路的：The few reports we get of the cogitations of the Politburo show mostly middle-aged men (with very few women) pondering the merits of market versus state, GDP versus human-development indicators, and happiness based on material goods versus happiness based on more intangible things. This group invites academics to speak to it, who attend, wait in thickly carpeted hallways, before being ushered with great apprehension into a boardroom in which the current immortals running China sit. Strictly instructed to give their presentations (keeping to time) and then, unless they are asked to stay, simply to stand up and leave, they go through the slightly surreal experience of standing before people who are immensely well known, but have no human engagement with them. Interaction is minimal to non-existent.

Brown, Kerry. CEO, China: The Rise of [you know whom] (Kindle Locations 616-623). I.B.Tauris. Kindle Edition.
